title: Orthopaedic Memory Foam Off-Cut – UK Made Visco Elastic for Dog Beds, Cushions & DIY Certified Foam – Supportive, Pressure-Relieving & Pain Relief (24" x 18", 0.5" (~1.25 cm))
features: Orthopaedic Grade Memory Foam – Engineered to deliver superior pressure relief, this visco elastic foam supports joints, reduces muscle strain, and promotes spinal alignment for pets and adults alike.
Multi-Use Foam for Pets, Furniture & DIY – Perfect for orthopaedic dog beds, seat cushions, campervan conversions, upholstery repairs, headboards, and other demanding custom projects
Customisable & Easy to Cut – Designed for flexibility, this dense foam can be shaped or trimmed to size with standard tools, allowing precise fit for any application—large or small.
UK Manufactured & Fire Retardant Certified – Complies with British Fire Safety Regulations (BS5852) and meets hypoallergenic standards, ensuring safety, hygiene, and quality in every sheet.

Built for Lasting Performance – Resilient, high-density structure resists sagging and deformation over time. Trusted by upholsterers, DIY professionals, and pet owners for consistent support and long-term use.
description: From the brand Previous page Our Journey Born from a passion for quality craftsmanship, we started with a simple goal—to provide top-tier foam products at wholesale prices without compromising on comfort or durability. Over the years, we have evolved into a trusted name in the industry, supplying homes, businesses, and DIY enthusiasts with high-density foam, seat pads, mattress toppers, dog beds, cushion covers, and more. Do you offer custom-cut foam? Yes! We provide cut-to-size foam for sofas, chairs, beds, and more, ensuring a perfect fit for any project. What is Foam & Upholstery Warehouse? We specialize in high-quality foam, upholstery materials, cushions, and mattress toppers, offering durable and affordable solutions for homes, businesses, and DIY projects. What makes your products unique? We offer premium high-density foam with cut-to-size options, ensuring the perfect fit, lasting comfort, and superior support at wholesale prices. Why choose Foam & Upholstery Warehouse? We focus on quality, affordability, with fast, reliable service and expert guidance to help you find the perfect comfort solution. Are your products made in the UK? Yes! Our foam and upholstery materials are sourced and manufactured in the UK, ensuring premium quality. Do you sell upholstery accessories? Yes, we offer a wide range of upholstery materials, including foam, cushion fillings, and fabric covers. How do I choose the right foam? Our expert team is here to help you select the best foam based on firmness, thickness, and intended use. Next page
